assignments.title: React Dashboard Project
assignments.subject: React.js
assignments.desc: Create a responsive student portal using React and Recharts

assignments.title: Binary Search Tree Implementation
assignments.subject: Data Structures
assignments.desc: Write BST with insert, delete, and all traversal methods

assignments.title: Integration Calculus — Worksheet 4
assignments.subject: Mathematics
assignments.desc: Problem set on definite integrals and area under curves

assignments.title: ER Diagram — Library System
assignments.subject: DBMS
assignments.desc: Design an entity-relationship diagram for a library management system

announcements.title: Semester 3 internal exam schedule published
announcements.message: Internal exams will start from 20 May 2026. Download the timetable from the academic office portal.

announcements.title: React.js assignment submission reminder
announcements.message: Submit your dashboard project before 15 May 2026 to avoid late marking.

announcements.title: Fee payment counter open this week
announcements.message: Students with pending dues can pay at the accounts office between 10:00 AM and 3:00 PM.

announcements.title: Workshop on interview preparation
announcements.message: The placement cell is hosting a practical interview preparation workshop on 18 May 2026.

galleryEvents.title: Annual Tech Fest 2026
galleryEvents.description: Students presented web apps, AI prototypes, coding projects, and poster demos during the annual technology showcase.

images.title: Project presentation
images.description: Student team presenting their React and AI dashboard project to faculty judges.

images.title: Coding competition
images.description: Participants solving timed programming challenges during the tech fest coding round.

images.title: Student demo booth
images.description: Final-year students explaining project workflow and features at the demo counter.

galleryEvents.title: Placement Preparation Workshop
galleryEvents.description: The placement cell conducted a practical session on resume building, interview confidence, group discussion, and aptitude preparation.

images.title: Resume review session
images.description: Placement mentor reviewing student resumes and improving profile highlights.

images.title: Mock interview round
images.description: Students practicing HR and technical interview rounds with faculty feedback.

images.title: Group discussion
images.description: A group discussion practice round for placement communication preparation.

galleryEvents.title: Freshers Cultural Evening
galleryEvents.description: Students welcomed the new batch with music, dance, drama, anchoring, and award moments from different departments.

images.title: Stage performance
images.description: Freshers cultural evening dance and music performance on the open stage.

images.title: Audience moment
images.description: Students and faculty enjoying the cultural performances during the evening event.

images.title: Award ceremony
images.description: Award distribution moment for student performers and event coordinators.

aiTraining.intro: Hi, I am your trained dashboard AI helper. I can summarize your portal, find risks, suggest today's plan, open sections, and guide you through student actions.
